arts.ttl: Marco Silva delighted with striking options as Fulham beat Watford in FA Cup
arts.sum: Rodrigo Muniz hit a first-time finish into the bottom right corner.

arts.ttl: Fulham too good for Watford but FA Cup the real loser as it becomes Thursday night afterthought
arts.sum: FULHAM 4-1 WATFORD: The Premier League outfit proved to be too good for their Championship opponents, but this match should never have been played when it was

arts.ttl: Fulham ease into FA Cup fourth round with home win over Watford
arts.sum: Fulham had four different scorers as they beat Watford 4-1 in the third round of the FA Cup at Craven Cottage.

arts.ttl: Fulham thrash Watford to progress to fourth round
arts.sum: Premier League Fulham begin their FA Cup campaign with a dominant 4-1 victory against second-tier Watford to seal a fourth-round spot.

arts.ttl: Fulham 4-1 Watford: Cottagers ease into FA Cup fourth round with big victory
arts.sum: Marco Silva’s side sail into next round with big victory over former club

arts.ttl: Fulham fly past Watford as Cardiff dump Sheffield United out of FA Cup
arts.sum: Fulham 4-1 Watford: Marco Silva’s side continued their unbeaten run as they booked their spot in the fourth round
How the game at Craven Cottage unfolded as Watford ended soundly beaten by Fulham in the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Fulham ease into FA Cup fourth round with home win over Watford
arts.sum: Marco Silva’s side toppled his former club.

arts.ttl: 'My goodness!' Vata scores 'special' equaliser for Watford
arts.sum: Watford midfielder Rocco Vata scores a "beauty" of a strike to level the scores for his side in their FA Cup third-round tie against Fulham at Craven Cottage.

arts.ttl: 'My goodness!' Vata scores 'special' equaliser for Watford
